Clipboard history

Click any row to copy it back to your clipboard.

Settings

Account, sync behavior, and preferences for this device.

Account

Sign in or enroll a new device to start syncing.

Not connected
User
Server
Device ID

Startup & sync

When RustClip launches and how it stays running.

Notifications

Optional OS toast when a new clip arrives from another device.

Auto-sync files

Sync files copied from Finder / Explorer automatically.

Copies above the cap are skipped automatically.

Global re-copy shortcut

Re-copy the most recent received clip from any app.

Use accelerator format: CmdOrCtrl+Shift+R, Alt+Space, etc.

Clipboard guard VDI

Re-assert the clipboard if it gets cleared right after sync writes to it.

Diagnostics

Daily-rolling logs stored locally. Open the folder or export a zip if sync misbehaves.

…

RustClip

Self-hosted, end-to-end encrypted universal clipboard sync.

Text, images, and files sync live across your macOS, Windows, and Linux devices. Only encrypted ciphertext ever leaves your computer — content keys are derived from your password locally and every payload is sealed with XChaCha20-Poly1305 before it hits the wire. The server routes blobs; it never sees them.
